hero.title: Manage operations, discovery, and curation in a workspace that feels like a product.
hero.description: Centralize profiles, discovery, saved shortlist, and internal operations in one control area.
hero.feature1Description: Search, review, and save creator profiles quickly.
hero.feature2Description: Keep profile edits and admin actions inside the same workspace.
hero.feature3Description: Standardize information reading with clearer visual hierarchy.

login.title: Access your workspace
login.description: Sign in to manage profiles, saved shortlist, and admin operations.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Set up the first workspace access and enter the application right away.

navigation.brandDescription: Management, discovery, and profile curation in one workspace.

home.title: Operations overview
home.description: Track what is ready across profile, discovery, shortlist, and administration.
home.heroTitle: Your workflow is centralized in a clearer, more responsive workspace.
home.heroDescription: Profile, discovery, favorites, and administration now share the same visual hierarchy with less wasted space and faster reading.
home.statsDescription: Core blocks to track the daily workflow.

cards.profileOpsDescription: Update name, username, bio, and avatar with a consistent presentation.
cards.discoveryDescription: Search the directory and turn strong profiles into a relevant shortlist.
cards.platformDescription: Navigation, states, information blocks, and actions now share the same visual system.

profile.title: Structure the creator profile
profile.description: Edit the public information shown in discovery and favorites.
profile.editorDescription: Fill out the fields below to keep the profile consistent across the workspace.
profile.emptyBio: Add a short bio to improve context, positioning, and profile clarity.

discovery.title: Find creator profiles
discovery.description: Search by name, username, or bio and save the most promising profiles to your shortlist.
discovery.searchDescription: Use name, username, or bio terms to filter results.
discovery.emptyDescription: Try a broader term or clear the search to view the full directory.
discovery.addError: Unable to save the profile to the shortlist.

favorites.title: Saved creator shortlist
favorites.description: Track the most promising profiles and remove them when priorities change.
favorites.summaryDescription: Centralize the creators that deserve continuous follow-up.
favorites.emptyDescription: Save profiles in discovery to build your shortlist.
favorites.removeSuccess: Profile removed from the shortlist successfully.
favorites.removeError: Unable to remove the profile from the shortlist.

admin.title: User management
admin.description: Review access, track updates, and change account status in one place.
admin.emptyDescription: New accounts will appear here for administrative review.
admin.tableDescription: Manage activation status and track the latest update for each account.
admin.updateError: Unable to update the user status.

access.denied: Restricted access. You were redirected to the home page.
